final:
module sram_16bit (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire write_enable,  
    input wire read_enable,  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] obf_memory; // 16-bit SRAM cell  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (write_enable) begin  
            obf_memory <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory  
        end  
        if (read_enable) begin  
            data_out <= obf_memory; // Read data from obf_memory  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
